stemHtml: Which of the following statements is true regarding lithium-type batteries?

options.a: Batteries with high capacity are a risk to the aircraft but small batteries are not.
options.b: High capacity batteries can be stowed in the hold or cabin of the aircraft.
options.c: A small blow that caused a dent can cause large internal damage to the battery.
options.d: The batteries are highly flammable but will NOT explode.
